title: MoU Negotiations Collapse — From Diplomacy to Military Escalation
snippet: In 48 hours, Trump's posture shifted from 'disappointing' (June 10) to Hegseth's 'negotiate with bombs' to Trump's 'bomb the S out of them tomorrow night.' The MoU 60-day framework appears dead. The military track has decisively replaced the diplomatic track, marking the most significant strategic pivot since the war began.
tag_reason: 6/10 이란 MoU 거부/역제안(src-1677) 후속 — 48시간 만에 외교→군사 전환 공식화, MoU 프레임워크 사실상 사망
